scripts.postinstall: (pip install -e ".[treesitter-full]" 2>/dev/null || pip3 install -e ".[treesitter-full]" 2>/dev/null || python3 -m pip install -e ".[treesitter-full]" 2>/dev/null || echo 'WARNING: pip not found. Install Python package manually: pip install -e .[treesitter-full]') && node ./npm-package/bin/cli.mjs
